title: krameria linearis
intro: Krameria linearis, also known as Ratanhia or Krameria, is a small, flowering plant native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate saliva production and serve as a natural anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Krameria linearis include its potential to help with gum inflammation and mouth ulcers, as well as its antimicrobial properties which can aid in wound healing. Krameria linearis is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to treat various oral health issues.
